compiled_state.title: [ccc3-954a] GREEN: Run markdown migration on plugins/dso/
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## What to do
Run the migration script on all .md files under plugins/dso/.

## Steps
1. Dry-run: python3 scripts/migrate-markdown-refs.py --dry-run --verbose plugins/dso/agents/ plugins/dso/skills/ plugins/dso/docs/
2. Apply: python3 scripts/migrate-markdown-refs.py plugins/dso/agents/ plugins/dso/skills/ plugins/dso/docs/
3. Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh (must exit 0)
4. Unit tests: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test-migrate-markdown-refs.py -v
5. Regenerate auto-generated agents if needed: bash plugins/dso/scripts/build-review-agents.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Verification test passes
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh
- [ ] Zero plugins/dso refs in .md files
  Verify: test -z "$(grep -rn plugins/dso plugins/dso/ --include="*.md")"
- [ ] Unit tests pass
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test-migrate-markdown-refs.py -v
